name: Profile_R5_Substance_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.Substance resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 Substance resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Substance resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.Substance resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 Substance resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Substance resources.

element.comment:
Element `Substance.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Substance.status` as `Equivalent`.
An externally-defined extension that has been mapped as the representation of FHIR R5 element `Substance.status`: `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/artifact-status`.

element.definition: R5: `Substance.code` additional types (CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/SubstanceDefinition)) additional types from child elements (reference)
element.comment:
Element `Substance.code` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Substance.code` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `Substance.code` do not cover the following types: CodeableReference.
The mappings for `Substance.code` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: reference.
This could be a reference to an externally defined code.  It could also be a locally assigned code (e.g. a formulary),  optionally with translations to the standard drug codes.
